artPrompt: A dramatic moment as a swelling toxic tide engulfs a suburban shoreline, murky green water boiling with sickly bioluminescence as it swallows fences, lawns, and a half-submerged mailbox under a bruised stormy sky. Rusted pipes and crumbling concrete recede into churning haze. Sweeping wide film-still framing of inundation at epic scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Toxic Tide Rises
text: Roll a six-sided die. The Toxic Tide Rises deals that much damage, plus 1 for each sludge counter among creatures you control, divided as you choose among any number of target creatures and players. The whole shoreline goes underwater. The whole shoreline was somebody's lawn.
flavorText: High tide is now wherever the thing decides it is.
